chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. D-684 of 2012 For Directions 1.For orders on CMA 4886/2023 2.For orders on CMA 4884/2023 28-11-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner No.64/applicant Waheed Ali. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents-SMC. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G - Sindh. ******* 1. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant has not appeared before the relevant authority since issuance of regularization order dated 14.10.2021 and such publications were also made in various newspapers requesting the applicant and others to appear before the relevant authority and join duty, but the applicant failed to respond. Now they are in the process of taking departmental action against the applicant. However, he submits that if the applicant files an application before the relevant authority, he would be dealt with in accordance with law and in the light of above facts and his case would be considered as per rules. Order accordingly. Accordingly, listed contempt application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
